name: NIMCP_Brain_Immune_System
observations: Biologically-inspired immune coordination layer for NIMCP
Integrates BBB, BFT, and swarm immune systems
Components: B cells, T cells (CD4+/CD8+), antibodies, cytokines, inflammation levels
Auto-learning: Neutralization converts B cells to memory automatically
Dec 2024: Added GPU, Security, Information, Optimization immune bridges (11,705 lines)
Test coverage: 104+ tests for brain immune system
Next enhancements: memory persistence, cytokine storm prevention, tolerance, vaccines, complement, exhaustion, mucosal, trained immunity
